summary: Pipeline uses pinned tooling; GitOps manifests include probes and non-root defaults. Review medium findings before production.

findings.title: Example: ensure registry credentials are not logged
findings.remediation_summary: Use masked CI variables for registry passwords.

findings.title: Example: image tag should be immutable in production
findings.description: Illustrative high-severity finding; a real run would fail the policy_check job.
findings.remediation_summary: Pin image by digest or use a promoted tag from CI.

metadata.note: Example shape only; real output is produced by ai-devsecops-policy-enforcement-agent under artifacts/policy-check/review-result.json
